package rulecoverage

func PositiveJsonNumberVsFloat64Decode() string {
    ruleID := "json_number_vs_float64_decode"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`json.Unmarshal` into `map[string]any` for numeric data without `UseNumber()`"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
